sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33493" key="e)laxistiai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλᾰχιστ-ιαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n33493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">minute, infinitesimal</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μέγεθος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
